name: Chocolate Espresso Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In a food processor, add cookie crumbs and grind into fine crumbs. Add butter and blend until smooth. Press crust into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill while preparing filling.
Filling: In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add white and brown sugars and mix well. Add sour cream and ricotta and blend well. Add eggs and beat until the mixture is smooth. Add melted chocolate, espresso, vanilla, and almond extract. Blend until the mixture is very smooth. Pour the mixture into the springform pan. Bake for approximately 1 hour. Turn off the oven and crack the door about 1 inch. Leave the cake in the oven for 1 hour then remove and cool to room temperature.
Glaze: In a small saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat and stir until smooth. Add pecans and stir until coated. Pour glaze over the top of the cheesecake and smooth to the edges. Let some run over the edges if you like. Chill until firm and cut into wedges to serve.
